title: NEW @tarte cosmetics multisticks!!! AHHH these are such a creamy 2-in-1 blush and bronzer! BEAUTIFUL! 😍😍 #tartecosmetics #tiktokshopcosmetics #dealsforyoudays #tartemultistick
speech_summary: Tequila and tan lines. Champagne and caviar. Spritz and shades. Bellinis and bikinis. This is all four shades of the new Tarte Cosmetics. Maracuja Multi Sticks. As you can see, you get a bronzer on one side and a blush on the other. These apply so creamy. In true Tarte fashion, they put this into a bundle with a free brush. Look at how this blends out in just a couple of taps. You guys, it is so easy to use. This is really full proof. Like, you do not have to be good at doing your makeup. You're gonna be able to do this. I will say that these are very long wear. They last really long time throughout the day. So perfect for on the go. And I'm telling you, these are gonna go fast. They just launched. I'll drop a link for you down below if you wanna grab. These are stunning.
operator_note: 多为对产品色号的询问
